description_long: This is a discarded aluminum beverage can featuring the iconic red and white Coca-Cola branding. The can is cylindrical with a slightly tapered top and bottom, and a standard silver pull tab on the top surface. The exterior is predominantly red, with bold white script reading 'Coca-Cola' and 'Coke', as well as a white wave design wrapping around the body. Nutritional and product information, including a barcode and volume marking, are printed on the back. The can appears empty and intact, with no visible dents, rust, or damage. Its glossy finish reflects light, and the surface is smooth and hard to the touch.
description: A red and white Coca-Cola aluminum can with a glossy, smooth surface and clear branding. The can is intact, featuring a standard pull tab and detailed label text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold 'Coke' text and part of the white wave design on a red background.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full 'Coca-Cola' script and part of the can's seam with vertical label details.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the product information, barcode, and volume marking, with the Coca-Cola logo above.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the large 'Coke' text and a portion of the barcode and label details.
attribute_brand_logo: White Coca-Cola script logo with a flowing wave design on a red background.
